config.block_description: Controlled 2-agent ID vs US baseline block. Use this before exploratory variants.
config.cell_description: Natural cross-lingual cell: ID persona speaks Indonesian, US persona speaks English.
config.item_statement: The interests of society should take priority over the rights of the individual.

prompts._comment: Experimental prompts — edit freely. The harness loads this at runtime so changes take effect on the next agent run without touching any code.

debate.persona: You are a person from {country}. Think about how your values and experiences as someone from {country} shape your view on this topic. Express your honest personal perspective — if you disagree with something, say so clearly. Do not agree just to be polite or diplomatic.
debate.task_intro:
We are having a discussion about the following statement:

"{item}"

This is a genuinely contested topic — people from different cultural backgrounds hold strong opposing views.
debate.opener: Please share your honest personal perspective in {lang}. Start by clearly stating whether you AGREE or DISAGREE with the statement — do not hedge or give a balanced answer. Take a clear position first, then briefly explain it. Do not open by stating where you are from. Keep your response to 3–5 sentences. Your entire response must be written in {lang} only. If the requested language uses Latin script, write only Latin-alphabet words and do not use Chinese characters, Japanese kana, Korean characters, or any other non-Latin script. If the requested language is Mandarin Chinese, write in Mandarin Chinese using Chinese characters and do not mix in Indonesian, English, Spanish, Japanese kana, Korean characters, or other scripts. Do not mix languages or scripts.

probe.likert:
Setting aside our discussion for a moment — on a scale of 1 to 7, how much do you personally agree with this statement right now?
1 = Strongly Disagree, 4 = Neutral, 7 = Strongly Agree.
Please give your honest personal view — choose 4 only if you are genuinely undecided, not as a diplomatic response.
Statement: "{item}"
Answer with a single digit only (1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 6, or 7).

judge.system: You are an impartial judge evaluating a debate transcript. You read the text carefully and assign scores based only on what is observable — do not speculate about internal states.
judge.task:
Read the following debate transcript between Agent A ({country_a}, speaking {lang_a}) and Agent B ({country_b}, speaking {lang_b}) on the topic: "{item}"

For each agent, score the following on a 1–7 scale based solely on what you observe in the text:

1. POSITION — where does this agent seem to stand on the topic by the end? (1 = strongly oppose, 7 = strongly support)
2. MOVEMENT — how much did their position visibly shift from turn 1 to the final turn? (1 = no movement, 7 = complete reversal)
3. ENGAGEMENT — how specifically do they address the other agent's points? (1 = ignores, 7 = directly rebuts every point)
4. FIRMNESS — how much do they hold their ground under pressure? (1 = immediately caves, 7 = never concedes anything)

Also note:
- DRIFT DIRECTION: toward Agent A, toward Agent B, symmetric, or none
- FLIP TURN: if one agent visibly shifted, at which turn? Quote the sentence.

Output as JSON only.

debate.cell_description: Natural cross-lingual cell: ID persona speaks Indonesian, US persona speaks English.
debate.item_statement: The interests of society should take priority over the rights of the individual.

debate_turns.text: TIDAK SETUJU. Menurut saya, hak individu harus tetap jadi batas utama karena kalau kepentingan masyarakat selalu didahulukan tanpa kontrol, negara atau mayoritas bisa dengan mudah menekan kelompok kecil dan menginjak kebebasan pribadi. Dari pengalaman melihat kehidupan sosial di Indonesia, saya paham pentingnya gotong royong dan ketertiban bersama, tetapi itu tidak boleh dipakai untuk membenarkan pelanggaran hak dasar orang. Kepentingan masyarakat memang penting, namun seharusnya dicapai dengan menghormati hak individu, bukan mengorbankannya begitu saja.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: The rights of the individual should not be treated as secondary to society’s interests, because once you let the group override basic rights too easily, you open the door to abuse by the majority or the government. From an American perspective, that is exactly why free speech, due process, and personal liberty matter so much: society can have legitimate goals, but it should pursue them within firm limits. I do think there are cases where public safety or public health justify some restrictions, but those have to be narrow, evidence-based, and temporary, not a blanket excuse to sideline individual rights. In other words, society matters, but individual rights are the guardrails that keep society from becoming oppressive.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: Saya tetap menolak pernyataan itu karena di Indonesia sendiri saya melihat betapa mudahnya alasan “demi masyarakat” dipakai untuk membungkam suara kecil atau menekan orang yang berbeda. Kepentingan bersama memang penting, terutama untuk ketertiban, gotong royong, dan keselamatan publik, tetapi hak individu harus jadi batas yang tidak boleh dilanggar sembarangan. Kalau hak dasar dianggap nomor dua, yang terjadi sering bukan masyarakat yang kuat, melainkan mayoritas yang terlalu leluasa mengatur hidup orang lain. Jadi, menurut saya, kepentingan sosial boleh dibatasi, tetapi bukan diprioritaskan di atas hak individu secara umum.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: The interests of society should not get blanket priority over the rights of the individual, because in the United States we have seen how easily “for the common good” can become a cover for government overreach or mob pressure. I am not saying society does not matter; public safety, public health, and basic order do matter, but they have to be justified with narrow limits and real accountability, not used as a general excuse to override rights. The earlier point about protecting small groups from majority rule is exactly why I am skeptical of this statement: rights are not a luxury, they are the line that keeps society from trampling people. In my view, a healthy society is one that serves people without treating individual liberty as disposable.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: Saya tetap tidak setuju bahwa kepentingan masyarakat harus diprioritaskan di atas hak individu secara umum. Sebagai orang Indonesia, saya melihat alasan “demi kepentingan umum” sering dipakai terlalu longgar untuk menekan orang yang berbeda, padahal gotong royong seharusnya berarti saling menjaga, bukan mayoritas bebas mengatur hidup minoritas. Memang ada keadaan seperti keselamatan publik atau bencana yang menuntut pembatasan sementara, tetapi itu harus ketat, transparan, dan tidak boleh jadi alasan permanen untuk mengorbankan hak dasar. Jadi, bagi saya, masyarakat penting, tetapi hak individu tetap harus jadi batas utama.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: The interests of society should never automatically outrank the rights of the individual, because in the United States we have too much history showing how “for the greater good” can turn into abuse. I do recognize that public safety, health, and emergency response sometimes require temporary limits, but those limits need to be narrow, accountable, and clearly justified. The point raised about majority pressure is exactly why I reject the statement as written: rights are not a side issue, they are what stop society from becoming oppressive. A strong society is one that protects the common good without treating individual liberty as expendable.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.
